summary: Iteration 29 - AI Features, Payment Reminders, and Admin Receipt Download Testing Complete. All 20 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working: (1) Payment Reminders tab with 15 pending clients, urgency badges, Send Reminder buttons, Send Bulk Reminders button, (2) Admin Receipt Download on Sales tab for approved sales, (3) AI Chat Widget (GPT-5.2) with contextual responses, (4) Approval Prediction card showing probability percentage + risk level + recommendations, (5) Document Check card showing completeness % + missing documents list. Fixed 2 bugs: (a) Frontend receipt URL path mismatch, (b) Backend timezone-aware datetime comparison in bulk reminders.
critical_code_review_comments: Email service is MOCKED - logs to email_logs collection instead of sending real emails
AI features use GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations (LlmChat, UserMessage) with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
AI responses may take 5-15 seconds due to GPT-5.2 API call latency
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 verified all new AI features: (1) GET /api/reminders/pending-payments - returns clients with pending payments + urgency level, (2) POST /api/reminders/send/{sale_id} - sends individual reminder, creates notification + email log, (3) POST /api/reminders/send-bulk - sends reminders to all overdue (3+ days) clients, (4) GET /api/reports/export/sale-receipt/{sale_id} - admin downloads receipt PDF, (5) POST /api/ai-intel/chat - AI chat with GPT-5.2, returns response + session_id, (6) GET /api/ai-intel/chat/history - returns chat history, (7) GET /api/ai-intel/case-document-check/{case_id} - returns completeness_percentage + missing_documents, (8) POST /api/ai-intel/validate-document/{document_id} - AI validates document format, (9) POST /api/ai-intel/extract-data/{document_id} - OCR extract data, (10) POST /api/ai-intel/auto-fill/{case_id} - auto-fill client info (admin/case_manager only), (11) GET /api/ai-intel/predict-approval/{case_id} - returns approval_probability (0-100) + risk_level + strengths/weaknesses. Frontend: Client Dashboard has AI Insights panel with Approval Prediction card (60% shown) and Document Check card (12% completeness, 7 missing docs). AI Chat Widget opens from floating button, shows GPT-5.2 responses. Admin Dashboard has Payment Reminders tab with Send Reminder buttons and Send Bulk Reminders button. Sales tab shows Receipt download button for approved sales with payments.

backend_endpoints.pending_payments: PASS - GET /api/reminders/pending-payments returns list with urgency levels
backend_endpoints.case_document_check: PASS - GET /api/ai-intel/case-document-check/{case_id} returns completeness + missing docs

frontend_features.payment_reminders_tab: PASS - Shows 15 clients with pending payments, urgency badges, Send Reminder buttons
frontend_features.send_bulk_reminders: PASS - Button sends bulk reminders to overdue clients
frontend_features.admin_receipt_download: PASS - Receipt button downloads PDF for approved sales
frontend_features.approval_prediction_card: PASS - Shows 60% probability, MEDIUM risk, recommended actions
frontend_features.document_check_card: PASS - Shows 12% completeness, 7 missing documents listed
frontend_features.ai_chat_widget: PASS - Opens from floating button, sends messages, receives GPT-5.2 responses

bugs_fixed.fix: Updated AdminDashboard.jsx to use correct URL path

bugs_fixed.root_cause: TypeError: can't subtract offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes in send_bulk_reminders
bugs_fixed.fix: Added timezone awareness check: if last_sent.tzinfo is None, replace with UTC

mocked_services.email_service: MOCKED - send_email logs to email_logs collection instead of sending real emails
